text:
よし、こんなものだな。
今回もさすがと言うべきか
想像以上に良い探索になった。

やはりお前と行く探索は
得られるものが多い。

ともあれ、良い練習になった。
では、一度帰還す

That should about do it. That went even better
than I expected-- which I guess is about what
I expect from you at this point.

Going out exploring with you certainly has
borne fruit for me.

In any case, that was good practice. Now, we
should head back.
